articles.title: Harvard grad student workers end 40-day strike without a contract
articles.description:
The union will return to the bargaining table June 9 and 23.

summary: Harvard grad student workers ended a 40-day strike on June 1, 2026.
The union plans to resume negotiations on June 9 and 23.
Local students and faculty may face continued uncertainty regarding labor conditions.

articles.title: Norton bakery apologizes for customer-requested Hitler cake posted on Facebook
articles.description:

summary: Norton bakery Sweet Stuff Back Shop apologized for posting a controversial cake on Facebook.

articles.title: Mass. police department cancels appearance of Trump-backed ‘Freedom Truck’ over ties to right-wing organization
articles.description:
